fv3_sinsg_flux_eta.reference: Harris et al. (2021), GFDL FV3 Technical Memorandum, §3.5, §6; src/operators/wind_ops.jl `compute_flux_with_sinsg_eta_arrayop` (imperative reference).
fv3_sinsg_flux_eta.notes: η-direction sibling of `fv3_sinsg_flux_xi`. flux = ((v + |v|)·sin_pos + (v − |v|)·sin_neg) / 2 · dy · dt. `sin_pos` is upwind for v>0 (interior: position 4 of cell j−1; south boundary: position 2 of cell 1); `sin_neg` is upwind for v<0 (interior: position 2 of cell j; north boundary: position 4 of cell Nc). Precomputation lives in `_precompute_sinsg_eta`.

metric_bindings.sin_pos: sub-grid sin(α) on the upwind side when vel > 0 (precomputed at v_edge)
metric_bindings.sin_neg: sub-grid sin(α) on the upwind side when vel < 0
metric_bindings.dy: physical edge length at the VEdge interface (`grid.dy[p,i,j]`)
metric_bindings.dt: scalar time-step binding supplied by the rule consumer
